title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.625 - Financial responsibility for child, how fixed
text:
210.625.  Financial responsibility for child, how fixed. — The financial responsibility for any child placed pursuant to the provisions of the Interstate Compact on the Placement of Children shall be determined in accordance with the provisions of Article VII thereof, in the first instance.  However, in the event of partial or complete default of performance thereunder, the provisions of state laws fixing responsibility for the support of children also may be invoked.
(L. 1975 S.B. 162 § 2, A.L. 2007 S.B. 84) 
Contingent effective date, see § 210.650
